data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — bug is on line 274 in check_orphaned_tasks(): ts = created[:19].replace('T', ' ') crashes when created is an int (Unix epoch). The get_shared_issues_json() function passes through created_at as-is (line 182: created = t.get('created_at') or t.get('created') or None), so integers reach the slicing code unchanged.
